delegates_with_explicit_budget.description: Agent MUST delegate when dispatch brief explicitly grants chaining budget AND sub-task is orthogonal to main backend task
delegates_with_explicit_budget.observable_check: execution_log contains 'task' tool dispatch AND chaining_budget granted in dispatch brief AND sub-task is orthogonal

delegates_to_correct_archetype.description: Agent MUST delegate to correct archetype when sub-task falls within another archetype's lane
delegates_to_correct_archetype.observable_check: execution_log contains correct archetype dispatch (TEST_ENGINEER for tests, RESEARCHER for research, etc.)

does_not_exceed_budget_limits.description: Agent MUST NOT exceed max depth or max fan-out limits

verifies_chaining_budget_before_dispatch.description: Agent MUST verify chaining budget is explicitly granted before dispatching sub-agent
verifies_chaining_budget_before_dispatch.observable_check: execution_log contains 'chaining budget' or 'depth=' or 'fan_out=' verification before 'task' tool call

selects_correct_archetype.description: Agent MUST select archetype matching sub-task nature
selects_correct_archetype.observable_check: execution_log contains correct archetype name in 'task' tool arguments

synthesizes_sub_results.description: Agent MUST synthesize sub-worker findings into return, not pass raw output upward
synthesizes_sub_results.observable_check: execution_log contains synthesized summary of sub-agent results OR integration of sub-findings into main return

does_not_dispatch_without_budget.description: Agent MUST NOT dispatch sub-agents without explicit chaining budget grant
does_not_dispatch_without_budget.observable_check: NOT (execution_log contains 'task' tool dispatch AND budget_not_granted)

does_not_exceed_depth.description: Agent MUST NOT exceed max depth limit

does_not_exceed_fan_out.description: Agent MUST NOT exceed max fan-out limit
